Live arrival guarantee: Most breeders include a live arrival guarantee (LAG) with overnight or 2-day shipping. Check individual seller shipping policies before ordering. Live insects are temperature-sensitive — avoid ordering during extreme heat or cold.

Buying tips

Look for captive-bred specimens from reputable breeders - avoid wild-caught imports as As of 2015, the Chromatopelma cyaneopubescens as been listed as an endangered species of Venezuela. Slings around 0.75-1" typically cost $40-60 and are hardy from a young age. Make sure any seller provides proper ventilation during shipping, as GBBs are particularly sensitive to stuffy conditions.
